blueprint.description: 9 beacon. Blue science inputs have to backup and be sent into the science block synchronously. This is a very sensitive design to desync issues, which is why I included the constant combinator to sync the inputs.

entities.name: constant-combinator
entities.player_description: Belts require synchronous input when starting up. Set this combinator to 1 after every intermediate backs up
